changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose SKILL.md (7KB) plus forms.md, reference.md, and scripts/ directory
Removed forms.md, reference.md, scripts/. Rewrote SKILL.md to concise extraction+creation focus only. document-pdf task failed: model tried pdfplumber as CLI instead of writing Python script
Added prominent instruction to always write .py files and run with python3. Added explicit 'write a script and run it' framing for both extraction and creation examples. Both tasks now score 100/100
Confirmation run - stable 100/100 on both tasks
